mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS cart_id, c.user_id, c.product_id, c.sku_id, c.quantity, c.selected, c.create_time, p.product_name, p.main_image AS product_image, p.status AS product_status, s.sku_name, s.sku_image, s.price, s.stock, s.status AS sku_status FROM cart_item c LEFT JOIN product p ON c.product_id = p.id AND p.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_sku s ON c.sku_id = s.id AND s.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_item SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE cart_item SET selected = #{selected}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
